description: Calculate the floodplain inundation width (top width) for the White River Muncie model using the HEC-RAS unsteady flow simulation results (e.g., `Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf`) found in the project directory. For each cross-section, determine the maximum Water Surface Elevation reached during the simulation and calculate the resulting top width. Export the results to a CSV file at `~/Documents/hec_ras_results/inundation_width.csv` with columns `River_Station`, `Peak_WSE_ft`, and `Top_Width_ft`. Additionally, generate a summary text file at `~/Documents/hec_ras_results/inundation_summary.txt` containing the maximum width, the station where it occurs, the mean width, and the total cross-section count.
